title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
